Contact

Reader, calculator, and report inquiries.

Use this page to contact Numerology Compass about corrections, calculator feedback, report support, broken links, or partnership inquiries.

Email:
guan@shanyuegroup.com

What to include

For calculator feedback, include the page URL, the birth date or name format used, and what result seemed unclear. Do not send sensitive identity documents or private account information. For corrections, include the sentence that needs review and a short explanation of the issue.

For report support, include the email used for checkout, the approximate purchase time, and the page where the report was requested. Do not include payment card details. For partnership messages, explain the product category and how it fits a reflective numerology site.

Response boundaries

We cannot provide medical, legal, financial, psychological, or crisis advice. Numerology pages are for cultural explanation and journaling structure only. For urgent or high-stakes decisions, use qualified professional support.

Please keep messages specific and practical. A page URL, calculation example, or support reference is more useful than broad personal details. Do not send passwords, payment card data, or identity documents.

Short, topic-specific messages are easier to review and route to the right update.

Numerology Compass
